message:
fix(deploy): Allow phage.db in web public folder for Vercel deployment

The .vercelignore was excluding all *.db files, which prevented
packages/web/public/phage.db from being deployed to production.
This caused the live site to return a 404 HTML page when fetching
/phage.db, triggering the "Downloaded data is not a valid SQLite
database" error.

Changes:
- Remove blanket *.db exclusion that blocked all database files
- Keep /phage.db exclusion for root-level database (build artifact)
- Add explicit !packages/web/public/phage.db to ensure the web
  app's database is included in the deployment

The web app's public/phage.db (1.4MB) must be deployed for the
application to function - it contains the pre-built SQLite database
with all 12 phage genomes, genes, and metadata.

🤖 Generated with [Claude Code](https://claude.com/claude-code)

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.5 <noreply@anthropic.com>

files.patch:
@@ -18,9 +18,9 @@ dist/
 packages/wasm-compute/target/
 packages/tui/
 
-# Database files
-*.db
-phage.db
+# Database files (exclude root, but keep packages/web/public/phage.db for deployment)
+/phage.db
+!packages/web/public/phage.db
 
 # Documentation (not needed for deploy)
 *.md
